text_preview:
- 01. REG. n. 061

- 02. PLACE: Baía do Sol – Mosqueiro-PA

- 03 DATE / TIME: 07 Dec 77 – at 10:40 pm

- 04. DESCRIPTION: Luminous body

- 05. COLOR: Blue, intense brightness

- 06. SHAPE: Undefined

- 07 APPARENT SIZE: …

- 08. MOVEMENT: straight trajectory, over Colares Island (North-East course)

- 09. SPEED: …

- 10. ALTITUDE: 60 m (estimated), over the trees.

- 11. DISTANCE: 3,000 m (estimated)

- 12. OBSERVER (S): Cap I Aer HOLANDA and the Civilians RATAN PINON

- 13. NOTE: The very intense brightness impaired better observation.

- 01. REG. n. 062

- 02. PLACE: Baía do Sol – Mosqueiro-
summary: Operação Prato reports 061–070: ten luminous-body sightings Dec 1977 in Pará; report 064 records object projecting intense blue light beams toward Colares Island; photographed by military team.
